sessions.lever: SESSION 6c/6d (ultrathink) - THE WINDOW THEOREM: closed the entire byte-free mechanism space for the region-3 nop, every clause source-verified or mini-measured. New closures: near-label referencers of ANY condition fold pre-flow (round-6); &&-take never expands when unused and dies at flow+jump2 when a dead store (u-battery + label-56 pass trace); forced_labels registration is EXPAND_INITIALIZER-only (expr.c 4137, static-data bytes); LABEL_PRESERVE_P is nonlocal/eh-only (stmt.c 665/3085); next_active_insn skips USE/CLOBBER only post-reload (emit-rtl 1855) so markers hide 3866 preconditions from relax; redundant_insn stops at CODE_LABELs (2001) making the slot-emptying window exactly {lbu,andi}; thread-steals of loads are may_trap-blocked (3461) so a matching lbu can never enter the slot; try_merge_delay_insns deletes thread copies or the OTHER SEQ's slots, never the caller's own (annul dead on MIPS); 4031 dissolution re-emits slot insns inline (bytes return). Validation: full DBRDBG decision trace of check2 (insn 386) matches the model exactly (sb setsopp+trap LOSE, la eligibility LOSE, move WINNER; guard 402 setneed-refused the move backward). CONCLUSION: the original compiler produced this nop from real C, so the model has a hole - next session hunts it in the trace (per-function log segmentation; enumerate natural block=0/-1 mtlr calls - they DO occur in this TU; insn-352 mid-block-target fill unexplained).
